summary: Frontend testing complete for language dropdown glass effect and 21 new hotel cards. All features working correctly: Language dropdown in hero has glass/translucent effect matching weather dropdown (bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl), language switching works and dropdown closes after selection, 59 hotels displayed (38 existing + 21 new), hotel cards without 'deal' field show 'Hover for details' without crashing.

language_dropdown_glass_effect.details: Dropdown panel has classes: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/15 shadow-2xl - matches weather dropdown exactly

language_dropdown_functionality.details: Clicking language option changes site language (verified EN→DE→EN), dropdown closes after selection

weather_dropdown_reference.details: Weather dropdown has: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/15 shadow-2xl - language dropdown matches this

hotel_count.details: 59 hotel cards found on page, all rendering correctly

hotel_card_fields.details: All 59 hotels show: name, location, nearest golf course with distance, description, image, quick view button

hotel_cards_no_deal.details: Hotels without deal field show 'Hover for details →' text instead of crashing - null check working

hotel_card_styling.feature: Hotel card flip effect and hover states
hotel_card_styling.details: Flip card animation works on hover, quick view modal opens correctly

homepage_load.details: No console errors detected, page loads successfully

passed_tests: Language dropdown has backdrop-blur-xl glass effect
Language dropdown has bg-white/10 translucent background on dark hero
Language dropdown shows all 4 options (EN, DE, FR, SE)
Clicking language option changes site language
Weather dropdown has matching glass effect (bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl)
All hotel cards show nearest golf course with distance
All hotel cards have quick view buttons
Hotels without 'deal' field show 'Hover for details' (no crash)
Hotel card flip animation works on hover
Quick view modal opens for hotel cards
critical_code_review_comments: LanguageDropdown component correctly implements glass effect with conditional styling for dark hero (bg-white/10) vs scrolled/light (bg-white/90)
HotelPartners.jsx lines 86 and 159 correctly use null checks for description and deal fields
Glass effect classes match between language dropdown and weather dropdown (WeatherBadge.jsx lines 88-92)
seed_data_creation: 21 new hotels seeded via seed_hotels.py script
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language dropdown glass effect and 21 new hotels fully tested. Language dropdown uses custom hover-based component (not Shadcn DropdownMenu) with glass effect matching WeatherBadge. 59 total hotels in DB. Hotels without 'deal' field correctly show 'Hover for details' instead of price.
